sentences.arabic: المَنْسَفُ أَكْلَةٌ تَقْلِيدِيَّةٌ مَشْهُورَةٌ فِي الأُرْدُنِّ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf je poznato tradicionalno jelo u Jordanu.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is a well-known traditional dish in Jordan.

sentences.arabic: يُطْبَخُ اللَّحْمُ مَعَ اللَّبَنِ وَيُقَدَّمُ عَلَى الأُرُزِّ.
sentences.translation: Meso se kuha s jogurtom i poslužuje na pirinču.
sentences.translationEn: The meat is cooked with yogurt and served over rice.

sentences.translation: Porodica se skuplja oko velikog tanjira.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around the large plate.
They eat together with one hand.

sentences.arabic: المَنْسَفُ يُقَدَّمُ فِي الأَعْرَاسِ وَالمُنَاسَبَاتِ الكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mansaf se poslužuje na vjenčanjima i velikim proslavama.
sentences.translationEn: Mansaf is served at weddings and large occasions.
